title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python SDK for Ollama; chat, generate, embed, pull, and manage models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers; stream completions or chat with local models.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration to use Ollama models as LLM, chat, or embedding providers in any LangChain pipeline.

title: ollama-webui (Ollama-WebUI)
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama comparable to ChatGPT UI; chat history, multi-user, model management, RAG uploads.

title: ollama4j – Java Client
summary: Unofficial Java/Kotlin client providing synchronous & asynchronous APIs for chat, generate, pull, and embeddings.

title: OllamaSharp – .NET Client
summary: .NET library and CLI that wraps Ollama’s REST API; supports streaming, chat, and model operations in C#.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal retrieval-augmented-generation template using Ollama + ChromaDB + LangChain to chat over your documents.

title: ollama-gui
summary: Lightweight Flutter desktop app that talks to a local Ollama instance; macOS/Windows/Linux builds available.

title: ollama-cli (rich TUI)
summary: Terminal UI built with Rich and Textual for interactive chat, model search, and parameter tuning against Ollama.

title: ollama-copilot – Neovim Plugin
summary: Neovim plugin that turns Ollama models into a GitHub-Copilot-like inline completion engine.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian community plugin to run private LLM prompts inside your vault via Ollama.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration by deepset allowing Ollama models to be used as generators or embedders in Haystack pipelines.

title: ollama-camunda-worker
summary: Camunda 8 job worker that executes service tasks using local Ollama models for AI steps in BPMN processes.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Community-maintained Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU support and model auto-pull.

title: ollama-nim – Nim Client
summary: Unofficial Nim library that wraps the Ollama REST API; offers async chat and generate functions.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Rust crate providing strongly-typed async bindings for chat, generate, embeddings, and model management.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Self-hostable Discord bot that streams Ollama replies into any channel; supports slash commands and custom system prompts.

title: ollama-slack-bot
summary: Slack Bolt app that lets teams chat with local Ollama models privately, threads supported.

title: awesome-ollama
summary: Curated list of tools, libraries, tutorials, and integrations in the Ollama ecosystem; constantly updated by community.
